subject: [PATCH v2 12/13] sunrpc: add SUNRPC_CMD_CACHE_FLUSH netlink command

2026-03-25.patch_summary: This patch adds a new SUNRPC_CMD_CACHE_FLUSH generic netlink command that allows userspace to flush the sunrpc auth caches (ip_map and unix_gid) without writing to /proc/net/rpc/*/flush. The command takes an optional attribute, SUNRPC_A_CACHE_FLUSH_MASK, which specifies which caches to flush. If omitted, all sunrpc caches are flushed. This is used by exportfs to replace its /proc-based cache_flush() with a netlink equivalent, with /proc fallback for older kernels.
